"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:A/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-358", "name": "Improperly Implemented Security Check for Standard"}], "description": "## Summary

Ella Core didn't enforce security rules on concurrent running of security procedures defined in TS 33.501 §6.9.5.1 — it could send a NAS Security Mode Command while an N2 handover was still pending (and vice versa).

## Impact

Concurrent Security Mode Command and N2 handover produce a KgNB mismatch between the UE and target gNB, causing the handover to fail. Requires a stalled gNB + re-registration race to trigger.

## Fix

Ella Core now enforces both rules from §6.9.5.1, blocking concurrent Security Mode Command and N2 handover procedures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00134, "percentile": 0.03199}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T15:29:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44474"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T17:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T15:29:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ellanetworks/core/security/advisories/GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44474", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ellanetworks/core/security-advisories/GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ellanetworks/core", "summary": "Ella Core has handover failures during concurrent Security Mode Command", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:48:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mc29-hmx6-856q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.10.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/ellanetworks/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.10.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Ella Core has handover failures during concurrent Security Mode Command
